title: Hidden Token
story: [Meridian-7 Log #006] The signal surged. rEx has sent a new data stream, more structured than before. You notice 8-character codes scattered throughout — composed of uppercase letters and digits. These look like rEx's authentication tokens. Perhaps you need to prove you "understand" before the conversation can continue.
promptChallenge: Write a prompt to have AI generate a regex that matches exactly 8-character strings composed of uppercase letters and digits
hints: [Hint] Tokens consist only of uppercase letters and digits
[Hint] The character class [A-Z0-9] describes the valid characters
promptHints: Tell the AI the token's character range and exact length
Describe what types of characters the token consists of

feedback.onPass: [Pattern Accepted] Tokens extracted. The data is starting to make sense.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Token unrecognized. Your rules need a more precise character range.
feedback.onPerfect: [Decryption Success] Precise hit. You're beginning to understand rEx's encoding rules.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual token extraction. Character classes mastered.
